name: Doma Fresh Launch Hunter🎯
description:

Early matters.

This quest is about getting in early on a fresh launch and actually participating.

Choose one of the new domain launches below and build a small position.

name: Complete quests to earn
description:
We share different ways to win in Web3.
Even when the market drops and prices fall, there are always opportunities to earn, and social tasks are one of them.

At Olympex, community support truly matters, especially during volatile moments.
With the upcoming launch of the Olympex Pass, the users who stay active, engaged, and present will be the ones most taken into account when rewards are distributed.

Supporting the ecosystem early is part of the journey.

name: ADREVA Extension Activation (Day 4)
description:
ADREVA is LIVE.

105,000+ signups
100+ advertisers
$1,500 launch campaign

→ Check out the new website
→ Add the chrome extension and start earning
→ Participate in the Leaderboard Competition (Mar 1–7)
→ Complete the Galxe campaigns

Join the Ad Rebellion ⚔️

--

We are inviting users to help us test and build Adreva during a 7-day Early Access Leaderboard Competition! Participants add the extension and earn points to climb a live leaderboard and complete Galxe quests for USDC, NFTs, and exclusive roles.

## Prize Pool

- **$1,500 — USDC**  
- **$100 — Giftcards.com**  
- **5 — Limited Edition NFTs**  
- **2 — Early Access Discord Roles**

## Daily Galxe Giveaways ($1,000 USDC)

- Complete daily Galxe quests  
- Winners selected randomly  
- Galxe quests are separate from leaderboard ranking  

## Leaderboard Competition ($500 USDC)

- All points reset at **February 28 @ 11:59 PM EST**  
- All points earned and awarded while using the Adreva browser extension during **March 1–7** count toward the Leaderboard Competition. 

**March 1 (00:00 EST) – March 7 (23:59 EST), 2026**
 

### Earn points by:

- Adding the **Adreva browser extension**  
- Creating your account  
- Selecting ad preferences  
- Viewing & engaging with ads  
- Maintaining daily streaks  
- Earning Achievements  
- Completing Galxe quests  
- Referring users  
- Submitting bugs/feedback  

Points update on the Leaderboard in real time.

**Final standings locked:** March 7 — 23:59 EST  

- The **Top 1000 participants** receive a limited edition Adreva “Proof of Attention” NFT  
- The **Top 15 participants** win additional USDC, gift cards, and other prizes  

---

Full Terms and Privacy Policy can be found at **adreva.ai**.

name: ADREVA $1,000 USDC Giveaway (Day 2)
description:
## Visit and follow the ADREVA Galxe Space for more early access quests!

### https://app.galxe.com/quest/ADREVA

Join our 2-part attention campaign designed to reward early participation, quality engagement, and community contribution ahead of our full launch in March 2026!

## 1. Early Access Testing + Giveaway *(Feb 25-Mar 7)*
## 2. Leaderboard Competition  *(March 1-7)*


## PRIZES  

- **$1,500 — USDC**
- **$100 — Giftcards.com**
- **5 — Limited Edition NFTs**
- **4 — Early Access Discord Roles**


# ADREVA Early Access Testing *($1,000 USDC)*
February 25 - March 7, 2026

We’re officially live in beta!

Leading up to the Leaderboard Competition launch on March 1, 2026, we’re inviting the community to help us test the platform, explore features, provide feedback, and stress test the system.

All leaderboard points reset on March 1.

Testers earn bonus points toward the competition, a limited edition NFT and early access discord roles by:

- Completing Galxe quests
- Joining the waitlist
- Testing the extension and providing feedback
- Reporting [Bugs/Feedback](https://forms.gle/joqu3zs4xA3sCgyj6)

## Daily Giveaways  *($1,000 USDC)*

- Complete social activation tasks
- Earn bonus points towards the Leaderboard Competition (March 1-7)
- Earn one raffle entry per day
- $1,000 USDC raffle pool

## Quest 2 — Early Access NFT  

- Learn
- Answer quiz questions
- Mint the ADREVA "Ad Warrior" NFT
- Claim the Discord role
- Earn bonus points towards the Leaderboard Competition


# ADREVA Leaderboard Competition *($500)* 
March 1 (00:00 UTC) – March 7 (23:59 UTC)  

## How It Works  

Participants earn points and climb the leaderboard by:

- Visiting **www.adrevanetwork.com**
- Adding the ADREVA browser extension
- Creating an account
- Selecting ad preferences
- Viewing, clicking, and engaging with ads
- Maintaining hourly/daily engagement streaks
- Unlocking achievements
- Referring new users and advertisers

Points accumulate in real time on the leaderboard.

- The **Top 1000 participants** will receive the **Proof of Attention NFT** and Discord roles.
- The **Top 15 leaderboard winners** will receive additional prizes including USDC, gift cards, limited edition NFTs, and more.

name: Adrena - Open a Long or Short Position
description:
Adrena is Solana’s peer-to-pool perps DEX with up to 100x leverage, trading straight from your wallet.

Perps, 100x, Solana speed
🧠 Peer-to-pool perp DEX, built on Solana
📈 Long or short with leverage (risk included)
🧾 No account creation, wallet-native flow

Mutagen rewards real activity
🧪 Mutagen tracks trading engagement beyond raw PnL
🏁 Seasons can reward volume, performance, and participation
🧮 Scoring blends performance, duration, size multipliers

Rewards in this Activation: 3 lucky participants in this activation will be rewarded $25 USDC after the activation concludes.

name: Become an Adrena LP
description:
Deposit into Adrena’s multi-asset liquidity pool to mint ALP and earn from protocol fees as the house.

ALP turns traders into LPs
💧 ALP represents a share in Adrena’s asset pool
🏦 ALP mints on deposit, burns on redemption
🧠 Mint and redeem fees vary with pool balance impact
